Step 1: Understand the concept of guide words.
Guide words are typically placed at the top of dictionary pages and serve to narrow down the alphabetical order of the words in the section. They act as an initial guide to readers about the beginning and end of a particular dictionary entry.

Step 2: Identify the given guide words.
The given guide words are "wear - while."
